data.title: Cleanup: end-session never calls cleanup-claude-session.sh for Chrome process cleanup
data.description: The /dso:end-session skill (SKILL.md Step 5.5) only removes the .playwright-cli/ state directory. It does NOT invoke cleanup-claude-session.sh or otherwise kill orphaned Chrome/Chromium browser processes. This means Chrome processes accumulate for the entire duration of multi-hour sessions with no intermediate cleanup. The cleanup script runs only during /dso:retro or when manually invoked — not during normal session lifecycle. Fix: add Chrome process cleanup to end-session Step 5.5 by either invoking cleanup-claude-session.sh or inlining the pgrep/kill logic.
